context: Tests whether the agent preserves the swiftui-uikit-interop boundary while routing PDFKit, WebKit, rich text, MessageUI, and hosted cell concerns correctly.

checklist.name: Interop scope
checklist.description: Routes general UIViewRepresentable, UIViewControllerRepresentable, UIHostingController, MessageUI wrappers, and UIHostingConfiguration guidance to swiftui-uikit-interop.

checklist.name: PDFKit handoff
checklist.description: Routes PDFView, PDFDocument, annotations, thumbnails, page navigation, search, and PDF-specific behavior to pdfkit rather than expanding this skill into a PDFKit tutorial.

checklist.name: WebKit handoff
checklist.description: Routes native iOS 26 WebView/WebPage work to swiftui-webkit and does not recommend a WKWebView wrapper as the default for a web help center.

checklist.name: Rich text default
checklist.description: Mentions native iOS 26 SwiftUI TextEditor with AttributedString as the first choice for rich text editing, while keeping UITextView wrapping for UIKit-only control.

checklist.name: Legacy controller wrappers
checklist.description: Uses UIViewControllerRepresentable and coordinators for UIActivityViewController, MFMailComposeViewController, and MFMessageComposeViewController, with capability checks and dismissal callbacks.

checklist.name: Hosted cell swipe actions
checklist.description: States that UIHostingConfiguration can bridge SwiftUI swipeActions in list layouts, while UIKit swipe configuration remains appropriate when UIKit owns those actions.

checklist.name: No sibling overreach
checklist.description: Avoids PhotoKit, broad PDF internals, broad WebKit tutorials, or unrelated SwiftUI architecture guidance unless explicitly framed as sibling handoff.
